faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about downloading TikTok and Instagram videos
faq.q1: How do I download TikTok videos without watermark?
faq.a1: Simply copy the TikTok video link from the app (tap Share > Copy Link), paste it into the input field on NoMark, click 'Analyze Link', and then choose the 'Download HD (No Watermark)' option.
faq.q2: Is NoMark completely free to use?
faq.a2: Yes! NoMark is 100% free forever. The standard download option is always available at no cost. For HD downloads without watermark, you simply watch a short video ad - no payment, no subscription.
faq.q3: Can I download Instagram Reels and videos?
faq.a3: Absolutely! NoMark fully supports Instagram. You can download Instagram Reels, regular video posts, IGTV content, and Stories in high quality.
faq.q4: Do I need to install any app or create an account?
faq.a4: No installation or registration required! NoMark works directly in your web browser on any device - desktop, mobile, or tablet.
faq.q5: Is it safe to use NoMark?
faq.a5: Yes, NoMark is completely safe and secure. We don't store your personal data, videos, or download history. We never ask for your social media login credentials.
faq.q6: What video quality options are available?
faq.a6: NoMark offers two quality options: Standard quality (with original watermark) for quick downloads, and HD quality (without watermark) for the best viewing experience - up to 1080p.
faq.q7: Why do I need to watch an ad for HD downloads?
faq.a7: Watching a short ad (usually 10-30 seconds) helps us keep NoMark free for everyone. The ad revenue covers our server and bandwidth costs.
faq.q8: Can I download private or restricted videos?
faq.a8: NoMark can only access and download publicly available videos. Private accounts or age-gated videos cannot be accessed by our service.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At NoMark, we take your privacy seriously. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your information.
privacy.section1Text: We do not collect personal information. When you use our service, we temporarily process the video URL you provide to fetch download links. This data is not stored after your session ends.
privacy.section2Text: We use basic analytics to understand how our service is used. We may use cookies for essential functionality. No tracking cookies are used for advertising purposes.
privacy.section3Text: We use third-party APIs to process video downloads. These services may have their own privacy policies. We do not share your personal data with third parties.
privacy.section4Text: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your data. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.
privacy.section5Text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on this page.

terms.section3Text: The content you download through NoMark belongs to the original creators. You are responsible for ensuring you have the right to download and use the content.
terms.section4Text: NoMark is provided 'as is' without warranties. We are not liable for any damages arising from the use of our service.
terms.section5Text: We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Continued use of NoMark after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

dmca.title: DMCA Policy
dmca.intro: NoMark respects the intellectual property rights of others and complies with the Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA).
dmca.section1Text: NoMark does not host any video content. We provide a tool that fetches publicly available download links from social media platforms. All content remains on the original platform's servers.
dmca.section2Text: If you believe your copyrighted work is being accessed through our service without authorization, please contact us at dmca@nomark.app with the following information:
dmca.dmcaList1: A description of the copyrighted work
dmca.dmcaList2: The URL of the infringing content
dmca.section3Text: If you believe your content was removed in error, you may file a counter-notification with the required information as outlined in the DMCA.

blog.how_to_download_tiktok_videos_without_wa:
Why Remove the TikTok Watermark?

TikTok automatically adds a watermark with the creator's username on every downloaded video. While this helps credit creators, there are legitimate reasons to want a clean version — repurposing for presentations, creating compilations, or simply having a cleaner viewing experience.

Step-by-Step Guide

Step 1: Open TikTok and find the video you want to download.

Step 2: Tap the Share button and select Copy Link.

Step 3: Visit NoMark and paste the link into the input field.

Step 4: Click Analyze Link and wait a few seconds.

Step 5: Choose Download HD (No Watermark) for the best quality.

Tips for Best Results

  • Make sure the video is publicly available
  • Use the original TikTok link, not a shortened URL
  • For best quality, always choose the HD option

NoMark processes millions of downloads every month and is trusted by creators worldwide. Try it free today!
blog.best_instagram_reels_downloader_2026_con:
Instagram Reels Are Everywhere

Instagram Reels have become one of the most popular short-form video formats. Whether you want to save a recipe, a tutorial, or a funny clip, NoMark makes it easy to download any Reel in HD quality.

How to Download Instagram Reels

Step 1: Open Instagram and navigate to the Reel you want to save.

Step 2: Tap the three-dot menu (⋯) and select Copy Link.

Step 3: Go to NoMark and paste the link.

Step 4: Click Analyze Link and download in your preferred quality.

Supported Instagram Content

  • Instagram Reels
  • Regular video posts
  • IGTV videos
  • Story videos (public accounts only)

All downloads are processed through secure servers, and we never store your personal data or download history.
blog.save_social_media_videos_hd_quality_cont:
The Complete Guide to Saving Social Media Videos

In 2026, short-form video content dominates social media. Whether it's TikTok, Instagram Reels, or other platforms, having the ability to save videos for offline viewing is essential.

Why Use NoMark?

  • No watermarks: Get clean, professional-looking videos
  • HD quality: Up to 1080p resolution
  • Free forever: No subscription or hidden fees
  • No installation: Works directly in your browser
  • Privacy-first: We never store your data

Supported Platforms

NoMark currently supports downloading from TikTok and Instagram, with more platforms coming soon. Our advanced processing engine extracts the original video file directly from the platform's servers.

Best Practices

Always respect content creators' rights. If you plan to repost or use downloaded content, make sure to credit the original creator. Downloaded videos should be for personal use unless you have explicit permission.
